title: Awesome 3D Mace
description: Enjoy now a 3D look for the incredible new Minecraft mace!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Awesome_3D_Mace/BH_A3D_header.webp) # Now the mace will have a new 3D look! Simply that, Awesome 3D Mace aims to improve the visual aspect of the new mace added by the developers of Minecraft in version 1.21. In our point of view, the original mace is not attractive at all... now we think it looks much better! Of course, it is compatible with shaders, and our intention is that it is also compatible with other mods that add maces to Minecraft. So if you need any compatibility, please let us know. We hope the new look of the mace is to your liking! ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Awesome_3D_Mace/BH_A3D_summary.webp) Don't you think the original look of the mace is a bit bland? Even meaningless? Well, now you will surely like it better, with this awesome 3D look, being true to the vanilla aesthetic, you will be able to give the mace a better look. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Awesome_3D_Mace/BH_A3D_faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Awesome_3D_Mace/BH_A3D_screenshots.webp) ![3D Mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HFk2Vqdv/images/993193553a1ee13085b2fe0b1be89ec4c77ed814.jpeg) ![3D Mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HFk2Vqdv/images/6ff927b47056b127448f22b27cae9d28742797d6.jpeg) ![3D Mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HFk2Vqdv/images/b7efc7f9868f7d90cf7920bf0daa738f9602737d.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
